details.test: Task 1: Cheapest sunset cruise for 2 adults with drinks under $80
Task 2: Two sightseeing cruises same day for 1 adult under $120 total
Task 3: Longest evening cruise for 10 guests on September weekend under $900
Task 4: Purchase $150 gift card usable for any cruise with message
Task 5: Cruise for 2 adults and 1 child under $200 total
Task 6: Highest-rated evening cruise for 2 adults with SUMMER10 promo applied
Task 7: Earliest tour from Old Town Pier within 7 days for 3 adults (60-90 min, $30-$60 per adult)
Task 8: Compare sightseeing cruises and book one with audio guide + free 24h cancellation under $75
